auditItems.title: Host profile
details: Total RAM: 15.34 GB, available RAM: 3.92 GB

auditItems.title: UAC state
auditItems.recommendation: Keep UAC enabled for interactive elevation checks.

auditItems.title: Microsoft Defender service
auditItems.recommendation: Continue monitoring signatures and update status.

auditItems.title: Local user accounts
details: DefaultAccount :: disabled, password not required, password never expires
Гость :: disabled, password not required, password never expires
auditItems.recommendation: Require passwords and avoid perpetual passwords on daily-use local accounts.

auditItems.title: Administrators group membership
auditItems.recommendation: Administrator group size is small, which is usually easier to control.

auditItems.title: Password and lockout policy
auditItems.recommendation: Aim for at least 8-12 characters, password history, and a non-zero account lockout threshold.

auditItems.title: Active network adapters
auditItems.recommendation: Check that only expected adapters are active.

auditItems.title: Listening TCP ports
auditItems.recommendation: Sensitive management or file-sharing ports are listening. Verify whether they are required.

auditItems.title: Firewall profiles
details: Domain :: enabled=True, inbound=NotConfigured, outbound=NotConfigured, allowInboundRules=NotConfigured, allowLocalRules=NotConfigured
Private :: enabled=True, inbound=NotConfigured, outbound=NotConfigured, allowInboundRules=NotConfigured, allowLocalRules=NotConfigured
Public :: enabled=True, inbound=NotConfigured, outbound=NotConfigured, allowInboundRules=NotConfigured, allowLocalRules=NotConfigured
auditItems.recommendation: Enable all relevant firewall profiles and keep default inbound policy set to Block where possible.

auditItems.title: Core security services
auditItems.recommendation: Core Windows protection services look healthy.

auditItems.title: Remote administration exposure
details: Windows Remote Management :: Not running, start=Manual
OpenSSH Server :: Service not present, start=
Remote Desktop Services :: Not running, start=Manual
File and Printer Sharing :: Running, start=Automatic
auditItems.recommendation: Review which remote-management or file-sharing services are genuinely required on this host.

auditItems.title: Windows Update configuration
details: Automatic updates disabled by policy: no
auditItems.recommendation: Keep automatic updates enabled and monitor whether update installation succeeds regularly.

auditItems.title: Recent installed hotfixes
auditItems.recommendation: Review whether update cadence matches your patching policy.

auditItems.title: Active non-Microsoft scheduled tasks
auditItems.recommendation: The number of active non-Microsoft tasks is relatively small.

auditItems.title: Tasks with risky execution paths
auditItems.recommendation: Tasks launching executables from user-writable paths deserve manual review.

targets.message: Dry run only. No files were deleted.
Dry run only. No files were deleted.
Dry run only. Recycle Bin was not emptied.

commands.title: List local users
commands.purpose: Shows local Windows accounts, status, and last password change dates.
commands.caution: Read-only. Use it instead of trying to inspect password material.

commands.title: Inspect password policy
commands.purpose: Displays local password length, age, and lockout settings.
commands.caution: Run from an elevated shell if output is incomplete on a managed system.

commands.title: Check local administrators
commands.purpose: Lists who currently has local administrator rights.
commands.caution: Use this to review access, not to modify group membership blindly.

commands.title: Inspect network configuration
commands.purpose: Shows adapters, IP addresses, gateways, and DNS settings.
commands.caution: Useful for baseline learning and troubleshooting.

commands.title: Inspect listening ports
commands.purpose: Lists processes that expose TCP listeners on the host.
commands.caution: Pay special attention to management ports such as 3389, 445, 5985, and 5986.

commands.title: Test remote connectivity
commands.purpose: Checks DNS resolution and TCP connectivity to a remote endpoint.
commands.caution: Safe for troubleshooting. Do not use it as a port-scanning substitute on third-party networks.

commands.title: Review running services
commands.purpose: Shows service states and helps spot disabled or unexpected services.
commands.caution: Focus on Windows Defender, firewall helpers, remote access, and backup agents.

commands.title: Review scheduled tasks
commands.purpose: Shows active scheduled tasks that may affect startup or persistence.
commands.caution: Review tasks before disabling them to avoid breaking updates or drivers.

commands.title: Inspect recent security events
commands.purpose: Displays the latest security log events for learning and baseline review.
commands.caution: Security log access may require elevation or auditing to be enabled.

commands.title: Inspect Defender state
commands.purpose: Shows Microsoft Defender health, signatures, and real-time protection state.
commands.caution: If Defender is not present, confirm whether another endpoint protection suite is installed.

commands.title: Check system updates
commands.purpose: Lists recently installed Windows updates and hotfixes.
commands.caution: Useful for patch management verification.

commands.title: Flush DNS cache
commands.purpose: Clears the local DNS resolver cache when troubleshooting resolution problems.
commands.caution: Use for diagnostics. It does not replace malware cleanup or browser cache cleanup.

commands.title: Inspect firewall profiles
commands.purpose: Shows whether Domain, Private, and Public firewall profiles are enabled and how they behave by default.
commands.caution: Pay attention to disabled profiles or inbound default action set to Allow.

commands.title: Inspect inbound firewall rules
commands.purpose: Lists active inbound allow rules that expose services to the network.
commands.caution: Review the business need for each exposed management or sharing rule.

commands.title: Inspect Windows Update status
commands.purpose: Shows recent installed updates and hotfixes.
commands.caution: Useful for patch cadence checks, but it is not a full vulnerability scan.

commands.title: Inspect key services
commands.command: Get-Service WinDefend, MpsSvc, wuauserv, WinRM, RemoteRegistry, sshd
commands.purpose: Quickly checks protective and remote-management related services.
commands.caution: Investigate unexpected remote-management services before disabling them.

commands.title: Inspect scheduled tasks
commands.purpose: Lists scheduled tasks and helps identify custom or suspicious automation.
commands.caution: Third-party tasks are not automatically malicious; validate owner and action path.

commands.title: Inspect startup Run keys
commands.purpose: Shows classic startup persistence entries in machine and user Run keys.
commands.caution: Review unknown executables, especially from user-writable directories.

commands.title: Inspect event logs
commands.purpose: Shows which logs are active and most populated on the system.
commands.caution: Use it to orient before deeper incident-response or troubleshooting work.

commands.title: Inspect ACLs on a file or folder
commands.purpose: Displays access control entries on a file system object.
commands.caution: Essential for diagnosing access-denied issues and over-permissioned data.

commands.title: Inspect SMB shares
commands.purpose: Lists local SMB shares and helps review file-sharing exposure.
commands.caution: Shares should be justified and protected with correct NTFS and share permissions.

learningSections.title: База Windows и инфраструктуры
topics: Устройство Windows: процессы, службы, драйверы, реестр, файловые системы, загрузка ОС.
Управление пользователями, группами, правами, UAC, NTFS ACL и локальными политиками.
Сетевые основы: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, NAT, VPN, маршрутизация, SMB, RDP, WinRM.
labs: Поднять тестовую Windows VM и вручную настроить локальные учётные записи, UAC и NTFS-права.
Проверить сетевую конфигурацию, DNS, listening ports и firewall profiles через PowerShell.
milestones: Уметь объяснить, как Windows загружается и где хранятся основные системные настройки.
Уметь диагностировать базовые проблемы входа, прав доступа и сетевого подключения.

learningSections.title: PowerShell и автоматизация
topics: Конвейер PowerShell, объекты, модули, remoting, jobs, scheduled tasks.
Автоматизация инвентаризации: службы, процессы, обновления, firewall, event logs.
Написание безопасных скриптов, логирование и обработка ошибок.
labs: Сделать набор скриптов для инвентаризации пользователей, сервисов и сетевых интерфейсов.
Настроить Scheduled Task для регулярного аудита системы и сохранения отчётов.
milestones: Писать PowerShell-скрипты без копипаста команд вручную.

learningSections.title: Поддержка, обновления и восстановление
topics: Windows Update, драйверы, журналы, точки восстановления, резервное копирование и recovery.
Мониторинг производительности, работа с памятью, диском, автозагрузкой и службами.
Понимание, как безопасно чистить временные данные без разрушения системы.
labs: Собрать чек-лист обслуживания рабочей станции и сервера.
Отработать сценарий обновления, перезагрузки и отката на тестовой VM.
milestones: Уметь быстро собирать базовый health-check после инцидента или жалобы пользователя.

learningSections.title: Фундамент ИБ
topics: CIA triad, риск-менеджмент, поверхность атаки, уязвимости, hardening и defence in depth.
Модели аутентификации и авторизации, MFA, least privilege, password policy, account lockout.
Сетевые угрозы, lateral movement, persistence, privilege escalation, phishing и malware basics.
labs: Сопоставить настройки локальной безопасности Windows с типовыми рисками.
Разобрать несколько реальных техник MITRE ATT&CK и найти их Windows-артефакты.
milestones: Уметь читать базовый security baseline и объяснять, зачем нужен каждый контроль.
Уметь отличать плохую конфигурацию от нормальной административной активности.

learningSections.title: Windows Security Operations
topics: Defender, firewall, audit policy, event logs, scheduled tasks, autoruns, services, PowerShell logging.
Индикаторы компрометации в учётках, службах, задачах, сетевых подключениях и журналах.
Базовый incident response: triage, containment, evidence preservation, eradication, lessons learned.
labs: Собрать playbook проверки хоста: аккаунты, порты, сервисы, обновления, firewall, журналы.
Проверить, как выглядят нормальные и подозрительные scheduled tasks на тестовой машине.
milestones: Уметь оформить findings и рекомендации понятным техническим языком.

learningSections.title: Identity, AD и корпоративная среда
topics: Active Directory, Kerberos, NTLM, GPO, delegated administration, service accounts, secrets hygiene.
Разделение административных ролей, tiering, jump hosts, LAPS, auditing privileged access.
Базовые корпоративные процессы: onboarding/offboarding, inventory, patching, vulnerability management.
labs: Подготовить схему ролей доступа для маленькой организации.
Смоделировать безопасный жизненный цикл учётной записи сотрудника.
milestones: Понимать, где чаще всего ломается контроль доступа в корпоративной Windows-среде.
Понимать, почему права локального администратора опасны на рабочих станциях.

learningSections.title: Практические лаборатории и стек
topics: VirtualBox/Hyper-V, Windows Sandbox, Sysinternals, Wireshark, Procmon, Autoruns, Event Viewer.
Git, CMake, C++ для внутренних defensive tools, Markdown-отчёты, JSON-экспорт, SQLite-история.
Документирование: runbooks, baselines, чек-листы и отчёты по findings.
labs: Поднять домашний lab из нескольких VM и отрабатывать сценарии hardening и расследования.
Сделать серию мини-инструментов: инвентаризация, аудит прав, аудит firewall, анализ журналов.
milestones: Не просто знать команды, а уметь строить собственные утилиты и процессы вокруг них.
Иметь портфолио учебных defensive-проектов, пригодное для диплома и собеседований.
